turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good evening. I need to see a neurologist. I've been having frequent headaches for the past month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good evening! We have Dr. Kiran Bhosale in our neurology department. He has availability this week on Wednesday evening and next Monday morning. Any preference?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Monday morning would suit me better. What time?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: 9:30 AM on Monday is open. Shall I book that for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes please. I'm Farhan Shaikh, my number is 9867001122.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Appointment confirmed for Mr. Farhan Shaikh with Dr. Kiran Bhosale, Monday at 9:30 AM. Please bring any previous reports or scans if you have them. Confirmation SMS will be sent shortly.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sure, will do. Thanks a lot.
